---
title: "Flipbookr z wyborem kodu"
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    self_contained: true
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(flipbookr)
library(shiny)
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}
selectInput("kod_flip", "Wybierz kod do podglądu:", choices = c(
  "kod1", "kod2"
))
```


```{r}
renderUI({
  code1 <- "ggplot(mtcars, aes(hp, mpg)) + geom_point()"
  code2 <- "ggplot(mtcars, aes(factor(cyl), mpg)) + geom_boxplot()"
  
  kod <- switch(input$kod_flip,
                "kod1" = code1,
                "kod2" = code2)
  
  flipbookr::chunk_reveal(code = kod)
})

```
